name: WOW! Signal

phase_0.boundary_condition: The 1420 MHz hydrogen line frequency window

VINIT.justification: The uninitialized state of the radio spectrum before detection.

TANCH.justification: The hermetic frequency boundary containing the signal.

AFWD.justification: The directed transmission of the signal from source to receiver.

AREV.justification: The descent of signal energy through interstellar medium.

CLINK.justification: Sequential chaining of signal pulses into a coherent pattern.

IMSCRIB.justification: The self-referential signature of the signal itself.

FSPLIT.justification: Splits the incoming stream into potential signal and background noise.

FFUSE.justification: Reconstitutes the signal event from the filtered components.

EVALT.justification: Affirmative confirmation of the WOW! pattern.

EVALF.justification: Negative evaluation of random thermal fluctuations.

ENGAGR.justification: The state where the signal is both detected and potentially instrumental noise.

IFIX.justification: The permanent, immutable record of the 1977 detection.

phase_3.void_description: The empty radio spectrum before the Big Ear scan.
phase_3.true_description: The confirmed detection of the 6EQUJ5 intensity pattern.
phase_3.false_description: The null result of subsequent searches for the signal.
phase_3.both_description: The persistent mystery of the signal's origin (detected but unverified).

steps.domain_action: Initialize the Big Ear radio telescope receiver.
Branch incoming data into signal-candidate and noise-floor.
Propagate the signal through the processing pipeline.
Chain the signal pulses into a coherent temporal sequence.
Recognize the signal as a unique, non-random event.
Record the detection permanently in the Big Ear log.
Hold the signal in a state of unresolved origin.
Reject the hypothesis of terrestrial interference.
Reconstitute the full observational event from the processed data.
Seal the observation within the 1420 MHz frequency boundary.

phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: Earth's rotation relative to the Sagittarius constellation
phase_5.alfs_store: The 1420 MHz hydrogen line emission standard

phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The signal represents a low-entropy information structure extracted from high-entropy background noise.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → FSPLIT → EVALT → AFWD → CLINK → IMSCRIB → IFIX → ENGAGR → EVALF → FFUSE → TANCH
-- Class: WOW! Signal
-- Fingerprint: sig=(5,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=11
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(1, 9)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑚  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [2] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [3] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑚 → 𐑙  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [4] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [5] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑚 → 𐑙  | identity — self-imscription
--   [6] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑚 → 𐑙  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [7] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑚 → 𐑙  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [8] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [9] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑡  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [10] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑙 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def wow_signal_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑚)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (Initialize the Big Ear radio telescope receiver.)
  -- FSPLIT [1] (gran := 𐑚) (Branch incoming data into signal-candidate and noise-floor.) / FFUSE [9] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (6 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [2] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Identify the 6EQUJ5 intensity spike.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑾 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [3] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Propagate the signal through the processing pipeline.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Chain the signal pulses into a coherent temporal sequence.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑠 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (Recognize the signal as a unique, non-random event.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑭 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Record the detection permanently in the Big Ear log.)
        (.arrow 𐑳 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (Hold the signal in a state of unresolved origin.)
      -- F-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [8] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (Reject the hypothesis of terrestrial interference.))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [9]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑡)  -- [9] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (Reconstitute the full observational event from the processed data.)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑙 𐑼)  -- [10] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Seal the observation within the 1420 MHz frequency boundary.)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def wow_signal_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (wow_signal_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def wow_signal_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (wow_signal_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem wow_signal_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
